offer: For property managers processing 5–15 lease agreements/month, missed lease renewals cause revenue loss. We provide renewal alerts instead of manual tracking using spreadsheets.
problem: missed lease renewals leading to potential vacancy and revenue loss
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property managers seeking solutions
Indie Hackers discussions on similar challenges
DM outreach to property managers with a demo video
Engage in community forums for property management tools
try_it: Let users manually enter lease expiry dates and receive notifications
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for quick access
Set default reminder schedules for renewals
Allow CSV import for existing lease data
Enable one-click export of simple reports
